'''sachunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whacko|whacko]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whacko|whacko]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sachunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæchinith|sæchinith]] || [[word:sæchinij|sæchinij]] || [[word:sæchinish|sæchinish]] || [[word:sæchini|sæchini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sachuchunuth|sachuchunuth]] || [[word:sachuchunuj|sachuchunuj]] || [[word:sachuchunush|sachuchunush]] || [[word:sachuchunu|sachuchunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sachunuth|sachunuth]] || [[word:sachunuj|sachunuj]] || [[word:sachunush|sachunush]] || [[word:sachunu|sachunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sachufnuth|sachufnuth]] || [[word:sachufnuj|sachufnuj]] || [[word:sachufnush|sachufnush]] || [[word:sachufnuf|sachufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sachunuthu|sachunuthu]] || [[word:sachunuju|sachunuju]] || [[word:sachunushu|sachunushu]] || [[word:sachunuku|sachunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sachunuth|sachunuth]] || [[word:sachunuj|sachunuj]] || [[word:sachunush|sachunush]] || [[word:sachunu|sachunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sachunuthul|sachunuthul]] || [[word:sachunujul|sachunujul]] || [[word:sachunushul|sachunushul]] || [[word:sachunukul|sachunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sachunuthuthu|sachunuthuthu]] || [[word:sachunujuju|sachunujuju]] || [[word:sachunushushu|sachunushushu]] || [[word:sachunuku|sachunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sachunuthun|sachunuthun]] || [[word:sachunujun|sachunujun]] || [[word:sachunushun|sachunushun]] || [[word:sachunukun|sachunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sachunuthuoro|sachunuthuoro]] || [[word:sachunujuoro|sachunujuoro]] || [[word:sachunushuoro|sachunushuoro]] || [[word:sachunukuoro|sachunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
